title: SCIM Standard Provisioning

posts.author: jbozarth (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning. I am in the processing of trying to configure automated provisioning for Monday.com in Azure AD. When I go in to Azure, Enterprise application, pull up Monday.com and go to provisioning I get a message banner at the top that says

" Out of the box automatic provisioning to monday.com is not supported today. Ensure that monday.com supports the SCIM standard for provisioning and request support for the application as described here. To determine if the application supports SCIM, please contact the application developer." At the bottom of the page, it has a button “Get Started”, but it is greyed out. I am trying to figure out how to get past this point. Any help would be appreciated. I am set up as an application administrator in Azure.
